UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user preferences, watchlists, and account details.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user from Firebase Auth.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

watchlist.description: List of token IDs the user is watching.

savedWallets.description: List of blockchain addresses the user has saved.

role.description: The user's role in the platform.

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: User-defined alerts for token prices or whale activity.

uid.description: The ID of the user who created the alert.

target.description: The token symbol or wallet address to monitor.

value.description: The threshold value for the alert.

isActive.description: Whether the alert is currently active.
